entry.title: Handwoven Chain Bracelet
entry.summary:
Vendor: Schuberthan Gold
Type:
Price: 1900.00

This is an essential piece to adorn you day by day, on its own or combined with charms.

The bracelet is made in 900 gold (21.6 karat), whose exceptional characteristics allow the metal wire to be bend and woven almost like fabric. It is crafted in the same, meditative technique used for thousands of years. The loop in loop chain may well be the oldest form of a chain and ancient peoples' goldsmiths, such as the Greek and Etruscans, produced intricate works with several strands and pendants with it.

This bracelet measures 18 cm in length, but can be made in any length, even as a necklace. Please contact me for any adjustments, together we will find your perfect fit.

As all LURI pieces, it is crafted entirely by hand.
